description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a simplified, geometric body and a small, rounded head. The figure is dressed in formal attire, featuring a suit jacket with a collared shirt and a necktie. The head is minimally detailed, with facial features only faintly suggested, and the hair is short and neatly styled. The arms are positioned close to the body, and the legs are not distinctly separated, giving the figure a monolithic appearance. The overall form is angular and blocky, with sharp edges and flat surfaces, emphasizing a low-polygon aesthetic. The figure stands upright, suggesting a neutral, stationary pose suitable for urban environments.
description: A stylized adult figure in formal attire with a suit and tie, upright and blocky in form, featuring minimal facial detail and short hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, suit collar, and necktie, with the head and upper torso clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular profile of the body and the sharp transition between the torso and the arms.
description_view_2: Bottom view showing the base of the figure, with the feet area appearing as a single, rounded form.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the flat surfaces and the edge of the suit.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and necktie
